map.message: $(string.map_Smb2PortSelectionMapThe port was not selected for this transport.)
$(string.map_Smb2PortSelectionMapThe port was selected from the <server:transport> registry mapping.)
$(string.map_Smb2PortSelectionMapThe port was selected from net use parameters.)
$(string.map_Smb2PortSelectionMapThe port was selected from the device instance's configuration.)
$(string.map_Smb2PortSelectionMapThe port was selected from the global registry settings.)
$(string.map_Smb2PortSelectionMapThe port was selected from the <server:transport> policy mapping.)
$(string.map_Smb2DirectDataPlacementSecurityMapSecurity Transforms Enabled (Except For Shares Enabled With Isolated Transport))

string.id: map_Smb2PortSelectionMapThe port was not selected for this transport.
string.value: The port was not selected for this transport.

string.id: map_Smb2PortSelectionMapThe port was selected from the <server:transport> registry mapping.
string.value: The port was selected from the <server:transport> registry mapping.

string.id: map_Smb2PortSelectionMapThe port was selected from net use parameters.
string.value: The port was selected from net use parameters.

string.id: map_Smb2PortSelectionMapThe port was selected from the device instance's configuration.
string.value: The port was selected from the device instance's configuration.

string.id: map_Smb2PortSelectionMapThe port was selected from the global registry settings.
string.value: The port was selected from the global registry settings.

string.id: map_Smb2PortSelectionMapThe port was selected from the <server:transport> policy mapping.
string.value: The port was selected from the <server:transport> policy mapping.

string.id: map_Smb2DirectDataPlacementSecurityMapSecurity Transforms Enabled (Except For Shares Enabled With Isolated Transport)
string.value: Security Transforms Enabled (Except For Shares Enabled With Isolated Transport)
